title: How can I change the browser that Thunderbird sends me to when I click a link in an email?
creator: jmcburney
content: i used to use CCLeaner browser, but I have changed my default browser to Chrome. However, when I click on a link in an email in Thunderbird, it still sends me to CCleaner browser. I can "copy link address" and paste it into Chrome, but it would be more convenient for me to be able to click on the link and go to Chrome directly. Where in Thunderbird can I change this?

title: I'm unable to login to my Gmail account, error 400
creator: flashily.jockey945
content: "400. That’s an error. The server cannot process the request because it is malformed. It should not be retried. That’s all we know."

title: Discussione
creator: dario_gabrielli64
content:
Buongiorno a tutti,

Quando scarico la posta in Thunderbird vedo che in certi messaggi appare sulla sinistra una freccia e cliccando sopra appaiono altri messaggi nascosti sotto con la stessa discussione. Siccome a me piace vedere tutti i messaggi nella lista vorrei chiedere se possibile levare questa opzione in modo da vedere direttamente tutti i messaggi senza cliccare il messaggio principale. Ringraziando invio i miei saluti.

title: Want to Reset/Fix "Recent Folders" List in TB149.0.2 on Win11
creator: gil-ffx
content:
I like to sort my mail using the menu functions

Message-MoveTo-RecentDestinations

Unfortunately, for some time now, the "Recent Destinations" list remains very small and most folders, regardless of how recently I moved messages to them, do not show up on the list.

I have tried quitting TB, deleting folderCache.json, but that makes no difference. The list stays the same, and it does not get updated for most folders.

Maybe that approach is no longer a panacea :-) and there is some other way to fix this?

title: Last night Thunderbird deleted all my sent e mails, and can they be recovered?
creator: nancy63
content:
Last night Thunderbird deleted all my sent e mails. I had 7000 items in my sent mailbox. This morning they all were gone, except for things sent since 10:00 pm last night. Our server provider said they were deleted by Thunderbird.

Does anyone know why this happened and can they be recovered.?

We do a back up on an external drive. Can we go back two days and get them reloaded?

Is there a way to prevent this happening in the future?

I am using an old PC running Windows 7...yes, I know we are beyond support.

Thanks, Nancy
